title: Beyond Jagannath: Temples of Odisha!
description:
Odisha is not just about Jagannath Temple—there’s so much more to explore.

From the iconic Konark Sun Temple, a UNESCO World Heritage Site, to the grand Lingaraj Temple showcasing classic Kalinga architecture.

Bhubaneswar is also home to Rajarani Temple and Mukteshwar Temple, known for their intricate carvings and unique design.

Don’t miss Tara Tarini Temple, a revered Shakti Peeth, and Gundicha Temple, where Lord Jagannath stays during Rath Yatra.

Explore the mystical Chausath Yogini Temple and the scenic Harishankar Temple nestled amidst hills and waterfalls.

Which one have you visited… and which is on your list?

Comment below and follow @realnehagupta for more such content.
